title: 万に一つもなかったこと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has decided to run in the Takarazuka
Kinen, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Rice Shower! Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: I voted for you in the fan poll! I'm sure you'll win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?! Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew... Guess it's time for a break.

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Lady
text_block_list.text: Oh my, aren't you... Rice Shower?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! That's me...

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Lady
text_block_list.text:
Wow! My kids are big fans! Please come have one
of my croquettes!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Can I really have one?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I can't believe so many good things are
happening to me... Is it really okay?
choice_data_list:
Considering how hard you're working, you
deserve it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I guess...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: There you are! I've been looking for you two!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I just received word from the Hanshin
Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Rice, it appears you're a shoo-in for the number
one spot in the fan popularity contest! And they
want you to join the opening ceremony!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: On that note, the rehearsal is tomorrow, so—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm... number one in popularity? Me? A-and they want me at the opening ceremony?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Brother... Pinch my cheek, please.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sister... Pinch my cheek, please.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: This has to be a dream...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Pardon me. I may have gotten a bit
carried away too.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All the details are written down on this paper.
Please look it over when you have a minute.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... All these people... voted for me?
choice_data_list: Do you want to go to the ceremony?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Rice Shower and I make our way to
the Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Miss Rice Shower! This is where you'll be standing
when we present the flowers.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okie... I mean, okay!

text_block_list.name: Staff B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, once you're finished over there, could we
have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Okay! Got it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, it's okay. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Staff C
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Miss Rice Shower! We'd like to run
one more sound check, if that's all right.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-of course! I-I'll be right there!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I want to do my best until the very end, if that's
what it takes to make everyone smile.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...So please, keep cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
All right, good job, everyone! That's it for today's
rehearsal!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whew... Finally finished...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... I'm totally fine. I mean, there were lots
of firsts today...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But when I think about this ceremony and all the
people who will be here... I realize there's still
stuff I can do.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I don't feel tired one bit. All I want to do is...
work harder.

text_block_list.name: Staff B
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Miss Rice? I think you may have
forgotten something in the back.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! S-sorry! I'll go get it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack... crack, crack, crack... creeeek!

text_block_list.name: Staff C
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! The gate's gonna fall! Look out, Miss
Ri—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Brother?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sister?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hic... sniffle... B-Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hic... sniffle... B-Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-Big Brother! Big Brother! Are you okay? Are you
in pain?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-Big Sister! Big Sister! Are you okay? Are you in
pain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I managed to protect Rice Shower, but
got hit on the head while I was at it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, you're not! We have to get you to the
hospital!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness you're awake! The ambulance
should be here any minute!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! In fact, we owe you an apology. I can't
believe the gate would just fall like that...

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Again, you have our deepest apologies. I'll
accompany you to the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After my examination at the hospital...

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I'm so glad to hear that you have a clean
bill of health.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: We are the ones who should be apologizing.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
And... I also need to apologize to you, Miss Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-why? Everyone has apologized enough.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
We just received word that the Hanshin
Racecourse will no longer be able to hold the
ceremony—or the Takarazuka Kinen either, for
that matter.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
You see... we're still unable to determine the
cause of the accident at the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Moreover, you were injured. We must carry out a
complete inspection of the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Which, along with repairs, is estimated to take at
least three weeks.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
We've done our best to try to avoid canceling it,
but... something like this has never happened
before.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
I know how excited the two of you were for it.
You have my sincerest apologies.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So as soon as I showed up, something that's never
happened before suddenly happened?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is it... my fault?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice is so soft, but every word feels so
heavy...
